calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MIRIAM RIVERA's Motion To Approve Dismissal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve dismissal with prejudice of her individual claims and dismissal without prejudice of her representative claims as an aggrieved employee under the Private Attorneys General Act is granted on the condition that Plaintiff serve notice of the dismissal without prejudice of her PAGA claims on the LWDA.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
